'''sashotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:miaower|miaower]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-sh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:miaower|miaower]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sashotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæshetheth|sæshetheth]] || [[word:sæshethej|sæshethej]] || [[word:sæshethesh|sæshethesh]] || [[word:sæshethe|sæshethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sashoshothoth|sashoshothoth]] || [[word:sashoshothoj|sashoshothoj]] || [[word:sashoshothosh|sashoshothosh]] || [[word:sashoshotho|sashoshotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sashothoth|sashothoth]] || [[word:sashothoj|sashothoj]] || [[word:sashothosh|sashothosh]] || [[word:sashotho|sashotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sashofthoth|sashofthoth]] || [[word:sashofthoj|sashofthoj]] || [[word:sashofthosh|sashofthosh]] || [[word:sashofthof|sashofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sashothotho|sashothotho]] || [[word:sashothojo|sashothojo]] || [[word:sashothosho|sashothosho]] || [[word:sashothoko|sashothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sashothoth|sashothoth]] || [[word:sashothoj|sashothoj]] || [[word:sashothosh|sashothosh]] || [[word:sashotho|sashotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sashothothol|sashothothol]] || [[word:sashothojol|sashothojol]] || [[word:sashothoshol|sashothoshol]] || [[word:sashothokol|sashothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sashothothotho|sashothothotho]] || [[word:sashothojojo|sashothojojo]] || [[word:sashothoshosho|sashothoshosho]] || [[word:sashothoko|sashothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sashothothon|sashothothon]] || [[word:sashothojon|sashothojon]] || [[word:sashothoshon|sashothoshon]] || [[word:sashothokon|sashothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sashothothoro|sashothothoro]] || [[word:sashothojoro|sashothojoro]] || [[word:sashothoshoro|sashothoshoro]] || [[word:sashothokoro|sashothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
